system_alerts.base_under_attack: Alert: Primary Base is under attack!
system_alerts.capacity_reached: Warning: Command Capacity maxed out. Build Relays.

abilities.suppressive_fire_desc: Slows targeted enemy movement speed by 30% and reduces accuracy for 5 seconds.
abilities.siphon_desc: Passively drains Credits directly from an uncaptured resource node.
abilities.phase_shift_desc: Renders the unit completely invulnerable but unable to attack for 3 seconds.

m_1_01.detain_runner: Detain the Syndicate runner and follow the lead to the spaceport.

m_1_02.build_perimeter: Construct 1 Tactical Armory and 1 Drone Bay.
m_1_02.secure_mining_intel: Eliminate the lookouts and download the shipping logs from the terminal.

m_1_03.tag_freighters: Plant tracking indicators on 3 Syndicate cargo freighters.

m_1_04.secure_evidence: Secure 4 high-value Evidence canisters from the vault chambers.

m_1_05.hold_gate: Hold the primary sector defense gate for 10 minutes.

m_1_07.escort_truck: Escort the captured Syndicate supply truck to the safe sector.

m_1_08.extract_informant: Extract the rogue Syndicate technician to the evacuation zone.

m_1_09.survive_siege: Defend the Command Nexus through the full Syndicate assault.

m_1_10.secure_evidence_vault: Breach the blast gates and secure the Vault 7 Evidence core.

m_1_11.destroy_biomass_vents: Destroy 4 Nullborn Biomass Vents before they consume the resource nodes.

m_1_12.defend_hideout: Protect the temporary Syndicate ally hideout from the infestation.

m_1_13.retrieve_sequence: Retrieve the original biological sequence from the laboratory mainframe.

m_1_14.cleanse_relays: Clear infection from 3 primary Communications Relays.

m_1_15.launch_transports: Hold the checkpoints until 5 civilian transport ships launch.

m_1_16.establish_city_nexus: Establish a Command Nexus in the infected city center.

m_1_17.defeat_fixer: Defeat The Fixer before the biological payload launches.

m_1_18.escort_alloy_core: Escort the Experimental Alloy Core to the hive epicenter.

m_1_19.destroy_reality_anchors: Destroy 3 Reality Anchors guarding The Singularity.

m_1_20.evacuate_survivors: Move surviving combat units to the safe transport zone before the orbital strike.

system_alerts.base_under_attack: ¡Alerta: La base principal está bajo ataque!
system_alerts.capacity_reached: Aviso: Capacidad de mando al máximo. Construye repetidores.
system_alerts.game_desynced: Sincronizando el estado del juego... Por favor, espere.

abilities.suppressive_fire_desc: Reduce la velocidad de movimiento del enemigo en un 30% y baja su precisión durante 5 segundos.
abilities.siphon_desc: Extrae créditos de forma pasiva directamente de un nodo de recursos no capturado.
abilities.phase_shift_desc: Vuelve a la unidad completamente invulnerable, pero incapaz de atacar durante 3 segundos.

m_1_01.secure_local_nexus: Asegura el Nexo de Mando local.
m_1_01.detain_runner: Detén al corredor del Sindicato y sigue la pista hasta el espaciopuerto.

m_1_02.build_perimeter: Construye 1 Armería Táctica y 1 Bahía de Drones.
m_1_02.secure_mining_intel: Elimina a los vigías y descarga los registros de envío desde la terminal.
